description: CBT-based mental health platform providing mood tracking, guided therapeutic journeys, evidence-based coping tools, and peer support communities.

tools.name: daily_check_in
tools.description: Record daily mood check-in with CBT-based assessment and receive personalized insights.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user account.

mood_rating.description: Mood rating on a scale from 1 (lowest) to 10 (highest).

feelings.description: List of selected emotions describing current state (e.g., 'anxious', 'tired', 'hopeful').

notes.description: Optional journal entry or additional notes about the day.

check_in_id.description: Unique identifier for this check-in record.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the check-in was recorded.

insights.description: Pattern insights derived from historical mood data and current check-in.

recommended_tools.description: List of suggested coping tools based on current mood and feelings.

guided_journey_suggestion.description: Recommended therapeutic program based on mood patterns and needs.

tools.name: get_guided_journeys
tools.description: Retrieve structured CBT-based therapeutic programs for various mental health needs.

category.description: Optional filter by mental health category: 'anxiety', 'depression', 'stress', 'sleep', or 'social_anxiety'.

journey_id.description: Unique identifier for the therapeutic program.

title.description: Name of the guided journey program.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the program's goals and approach.

category.description: Mental health category this journey addresses.

total_steps.description: Number of steps or sessions in the complete program.

duration_weeks.description: Expected duration to complete the program in weeks.

techniques.description: List of CBT techniques and therapeutic methods used in this journey.

clinical_approach.description: Evidence-based clinical methodology underlying the program.

journeys.description: List of available guided therapeutic journeys.

tools.name: start_journey
tools.description: Enroll user in a guided mental health program and initialize progress tracking.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user account.

journey_id.description: Unique identifier for the therapeutic program to enroll in.

enrollment_id.description: Unique identifier for this enrollment instance.

current_step.description: Current step number in the program (starts at 1).

weekly_goal.description: Structured goal for the current week of the program.

next_activity.description: Details of the next recommended activity or session.

tools.name: get_coping_tools
tools.description: Retrieve evidence-based coping tools for immediate mental health relief.

tool_type.description: Optional filter by tool category: 'breathing', 'meditation', 'grounding', 'visualization', or 'journaling'.

situation.description: Optional filter by specific situation: 'test_taking', 'public_speaking', 'morning_dread', or 'panic'.

tool_id.description: Unique identifier for the coping tool.

duration_minutes.description: Expected time to complete the exercise in minutes.

description.description: Explanation of the tool's purpose and benefits.

instructions.description: Step-by-step instructions for using the coping tool.

for_crisis.description: Whether this tool is suitable for acute crisis situations.

tools.description: List of available coping tools matching the filters.

tools.name: track_progress
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive progress tracking across mood, journeys, tools, and wellness metrics.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user account.

metric_type.description: Optional filter for specific metrics: 'mood', 'journeys', 'tools', 'sleep', or 'all' for comprehensive view.

total_check_ins.description: Total number of mood check-ins recorded.

current_streak.description: Number of consecutive days with check-ins.

improvement_score.description: Calculated wellness metric indicating overall mental health improvement trend.

overview.description: High-level summary of user engagement and wellness.

weekly_average.description: Average mood ratings for each day of the week.

best_day.description: Day of the week with highest average mood.

common_triggers.description: Identified patterns or situations associated with mood changes.

mood_trends.description: Analysis of mood patterns over time.

journey_progress.description: Progress details for all enrolled therapeutic programs.

summary.description: Narrative summary of the week's mental health journey.

wins.description: Positive achievements and milestones from the week.

tools.name: join_community_group
tools.description: Join anonymous peer support community groups for shared mental health experiences.

group_topic.description: Topic of the support group: 'anxiety_support', 'depression_recovery', 'stress_management', or 'sleep_tips'.

group_id.description: Unique identifier for the community group.

group_name.description: Display name of the support group.

member_count.description: Current number of active members in the group.

moderated.description: Whether the group has professional moderation.

recent_discussions.description: List of recent discussion threads in the group.

guidelines.description: Community guidelines and participation rules for the group.
